generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, consisting of a permanent magnet synchronous motor, gear transmission, and cycloidal gearbox, with a maximum working range of [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed of 75°/s."
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driven by current input"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motion control execution"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor for measuring angular position and velocity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox for measuring angular position and velocity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for measuring motor current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current (I_M)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler, MQTTEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque (τ)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler, MQTTEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity (ω)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler, MQTTEnabler
]

instance SimulatedR_M : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output r_M"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedR_G : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output r_G"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedR_Out : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output r_out"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SysML_BDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysML_IBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for standardized asset description"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for standardized asset description"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetDescriptionService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time data and model visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelVisualizationService
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling service for system structure"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelingInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction for enhancing robot motion accuracy through model-based control adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight
]

instance AssetDescriptionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset description service using AAS"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetDescriptionInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data streaming service using MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance FrictionModelVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction models and data comparison in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelVisualizationInsight
]

instance StructuralModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model of the system"
]

instance FrictionModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters derived from data comparison used to optimize robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance AssetDescriptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Standardized asset description"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming"
]

instance FrictionModelVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction models and data comparison"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, gears, sensors), data streaming via MQTT, SysML and Simulink models for behavior simulation, AAS for contextual asset metadata, and dashboard for unified visualization of friction models and real-time data."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase of the robot's lifecycle, focusing on operational data during real-time robot operation for continuous friction model improvement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured reference values to assess friction model accuracy, with deviation analysis for static, kinetic, and viscous friction components."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards for asset description and SysML for modeling consistency."
]
